item.title: Ten Toon Tuesday
item.description:
All by Jon Adams; scroll to the end for more details.
From his website (https://www.hisportfolio.com/) : I’m an award-winning Art Director, Designer, Illustrator, and Writer. I got my start at a branding agency, have worked for several startups big and small, and freelanced for creative agencies. I do a little bit of everything from web, product, visual, UI/UX, and print design, to editorial illustration, cartoons, and writing. One thing I can't do is grow a beard. But I can Photoshop one pretty well.
item.dc:creator: rabidrob

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.06 LETTING GO

COVER ARTIST: TBD
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] G Tom Mac - Cry Little Sister (Trazer remix) YouTube: https://youtu.be/Ts-0Y2Is-Yk?si=bm_xszCQWOLz-5Ri Spotify: N/A
TONTON REVOLVER
Peter Xiao

Galmesh Rosewood
InHyuk Lee
Raphael Albero
Insist
Nokse Mojo
WLOP
Gal Yosef
Shai Daniel
Oscar Vega
Helena Nikulina
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra, @DerpyVaz ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, in no way, shape, or form do we take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection, only for the daily effort involved in comprising the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. Cool, either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: I love how the slightest inconvenience for a rich celebrity is their lowest point
item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: a small cuttlefishsticks collection: fish
item.description:
So... actually they're not. They're definitely bigger than a nerf football, but actually mostly they're only about 30cm long, though specimens have been found that were a meter long, which is still horrifyingly large for something that looks like that.
Made by Oregonian sculptor Keith Jellum, this sculpture can be found over a seafood restaurant in Portland.
item.dc:creator: cuttlefishsticks

item.title: Show and Tell
item.description: I got a new button from a socialist book fair in Oregon [Edit] Looks like theres a bunch of butt hurt bootlickers downvoting everyone's comments. You're loved no matter what the updoots say!
item.dc:creator: NotDannyDevito

item.title: Tech memes to keep the servers happy
item.description:
Minor Imgur outage, probably they forgot to feed the servers. Guess it’s up to me now. Enjoy some vaguely tech related stolen memes!
vimtutor helps
Not far off actually…
So close! Imgur was making it rain 503s.
(X) I’m in this picture and I don’t like it
My company got hit pretty bad by scammers who found a way to abuse us to send spam. I came very close to pulling the cables.
Truth.
I miss Limewire
Like every week there’s a new flavor
You are legally not allowed to view this meme until Friday
Haha just kidding. But actually this is true for the Vision Pro.
Kids these days! Well that’s all for now, hopefully this keeps the servers spinning for a little longer.
item.dc:creator: totaleclipseofdescartes

item.title: I'm excited but terrified all at the same time.
item.description: Long story short I'm having dinner with coworker tomorrow. She was the one who invited me over to her house for dinner. We don't talk much at work since she works in a different department and leaves shortly after I get there. She's amazing and beautiful and I'm boring and socially awkward. Wish me luck IMGUR!

item.title: If Bollywood made Star Wars...
item.description:
All the hands and fingers look legit... so it must be real, right? LOL
I wonder if he knows how to change lightbulbs!
For some reason, I can't stop laughing when looking at this, I can only imagine the sounds he's making in an Indian accent lol
wow! just wow!
Who is the golden princess?
I bet they still can't aim
item.dc:creator: MissySassy

item.title: He's a handful.
item.description: Rant time!  My sister is pregnant with her sixth child with her sixth baby daddy.  She claims to be putting the lastest one up for adoption when she's born. Most of the baby daddies are in prison and none of them are in the picture.  Every one of my sister's kids have been born dependent on drugs and needed weaned off. Child services have taken every one of them from her.  She does meth, heroin, crack, all the drugs.  I've had guardianship of multiple of her kids on and off for seventeen years.  At the moment our mom has custody of the other four, she couldn't handle the nephew I have now, he's too much for her.  He's not very well behaved, screams a lot, abuses my dogs, and doesn't listen at all. But we're working on all that, baby steps, progress is progress!  My sister won't get on birth control because she "makes pretty babies" and "doesn't want to put any unknown substances in her body."  She's an idiot.  Thanks for listening, imgur. Edit: thanks for all the comments of support, all :) Just wanted to say that we do have a psychiatrist to see my nephew but it's supposed to be scheduled through child services and they're hard to get ahold of so we haven't seen one yet.
item.dc:creator: Zinfandella

item.title: It's scary, America don't let this happen!

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1088 (powerful elixir)
item.description:
Hello, universe. You gonna be my bitch today. I'm alive and problematic! Let's get this bread.
Cowbirds (left) are brood parasites. Poor Yellowthroat.
Rory obtained several levels in badass when he became the Eternal Centurion to become probably my favorite companion in Doctor Who.
39, but yeah.
Yeah, this reminds me of grad school.
I wish I had this level of whiteboard skill.
It seems that the people of Ugarit were ancestors of the Phoenicians.
It's not eating them fast enough.
Coelophysis by Natalia Jagielska
Ah, convertitis.
Roy Chapman Andrews was one inspiration for Indiana Jones.
Probably my favorite part of the Gospel of Luke.
Also he said "I am." Pretty sure that's a pronoun.
True that.
Accurate.
I want to see the grimdark carebears.
So true with my "printer."
Accurate.
I don't recommend this spot.
My philosophy
Slice
Time. The great equalizer. Time crumbles things; everything grows old and is forgotten under the power of time.
Heyyyyyo
I should try this. My new Cpap face mask parts FINALLY arrived, and I slept well... until I woke up coughing because I forgot to add water to the humidifier portion. The previous mask worked so poorly that I never bothered with it. Whoops.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: (an exchange) P: "Whatchoo thinkin' about?" Me: "I forgot to make us coffee to have it ready for the morning." P: "Inconceivable! Beeeeep. Whatdoin?" Me: "... Making coffee?" P: "Okay." (I don't let him drink the coffee, though)
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.description: Hello MV! Dm me stuff that makes you happy

item.title: James from Australia likes my Novel! First Amazon review!
item.description: I haven't had a reason to look in on the store page for ages, but today I find this lovely person appreciates me. I shall pretend this is James off of Dank Pods. ( https://www.amazon.co.uk/gp/product/1916139701 for the curious). EDIT: wow. I don't usually post but you lot put me in Most Viral. Today was my birthday and this was truly memorable. Appreciate the love, Imgur.
item.dc:creator: SecretCatPolicy

item.title: “You storm just one federal building…”
item.description: Apparently, being held to account for your actions is “extremely inconvenient and embarrassing “ for him and his girlfriend. He also doesn’t understand why he’s being treated like a “terrorist”. What’s your defence here? “You storm a little federal building and threaten to hang the VP one time and you end up paying for it for the rest of your life? Freedumbs!!!!!” https://www.msn.com/en-ca/travel/news/capitol-rioter-whines-that-going-through-airport-security-is-now-a-huge-problem/ar-BB1h9cC3?ocid=sapphireappshare
item.dc:creator: boxak

item.title: About 2 years ago I woke up and made a decision to change my life forever - a little motivation for those of you working on your own resolutions this year
item.description: Hi everyone Every now and again I like to make a post here sharing a before and after in the hopes of inspiring at least one person to make their own change Background story I was over 275 pounds and experiencing quite a bit of health issues for such a young age (24) Terrible back pains, brain fog, no energy, no motivation, sleeping 12+ hours a day, eating 4000+ calories like it was a snack I knew I couldn't continue like this and I felt so controlled by food. I wanted to see if losing weight could help my overall health I woke up on October 20, 2021 and said enough was enough. By August of 2022 I was down 100+ pounds - My focus switched from weight loss to maintaining my new weight and strength training My back pain completely disappeared, brain fog is gone, energy and motivation are levels I've never experienced before, and I just overall feel the best I've felt mentally / physically No surgeries, no weight loss products or BS diets / gimmicks - hard work in the gym + calorie deficit was my solution After losing over 100 pounds in 2022 I’ve now maintained the loss for over 1 year. I’m currently about 175 If you're struggling with your weight I hope this can give you just a little bit of inspiration today
item.dc:creator: ibeatfood

item.title: Things are getting better.
item.description:
Good morning everyone! About a week ago I posted about how I was assaulted and evicted from the house I was living in by family after I snapped at their extreme rightwing political views. (for anyone wanting context check my previous post) Since then I have been looking for a place to stay that will also accept my cat. I found a place about 2 days ago and have since moved in. My cat will be joining me tomorrow! It's a bit of a hole, but it will do for now. I have a few things to say to you guys; For those of you who offered me words of support and kindness, thank you. This kept me going through those long nights. You are such a supportive community and it is so heart warming to see. To those of you who reached out with financial support. Without you, I wouldn't have been able to pay my bond without going into debt. So thank you for helping me stay in the positive and reuniting me with my cat. To that one guy who asked if I was going to become a nazi. I've thought about it and decided it's not the lifestyle for me. For those of you wondering about the legal side, my father has been charged with assault and I'm now in talks with a lawyer about my legal options for the eviction. For what comes next, now that I have ground beneath me, I'll slowly start picking myself back up and putting everything back together. Stay strong you beautiful people, thank you so much for everything and enjoy some memes.
Also kitty cat.
item.dc:creator: MyNameIsBrentAndIWouldLikeToSeeGoodDogs

item.title: To Mute or Unmute….
item.description: Edit: Sauce below in @iaimtomisbehave’s comment below. Thank you
